title: no DB migration strategy: first schema change breaks existing wallet DBs
description: WalletStore.new() uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS with no schema version tracking (no PRAGMA user_version, no migrations table). Trigger: any future column addition or rename — the existing table is silently left at the old schema, causing runtime errors or missing columns. Maintenance consequence: every schema change requires a manual migration story or a breaking change that deletes the DB. This is the first DB commit; the pattern set here will be copied by future contributors.
